title: Stop Trading CPI Like This (Funded Traders Know Better)
description: CPI releases create massive volatility but most traders position wrong. Here's what funded traders do instead during high-impact news events.
script: Stop trading CPI like this. I see funded traders fail daily. Trading the news spike kills accounts. Smart money already moved. Real traders position before CPI. Use midnight open setups. Funded traders know this secret. Follow R2F Trading for more.
